chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI J. Misc. Application No. 48 of 2015 a/w J.M.No.55 of 2015 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1.For hearing of CMA No.12254/2015 2.For hearing of CMA No.12255/2015 14.01.2026 Ms. Hania Haroon, advocate for applicant Mr. Muhammad Irfan, advocate for respondent No.1 ---------- Counsel for applicant in J.M.Nos.48 and 55 of 2015 submits that the subject patent No.141470 in J.M.No.48/2015 and subject patent No.141471 in J.M.No.55/2015, have expired on 21.12.2025, hence, Counsel no longer wishes to proceed with these J.Ms., which are dismissed as withdrawn. Office to place a copy of this order in the connected matter. J U D G E Ashraf
